reviews.review_description: I was playing and free longarms inf shinyrocks Halloween update plus public servers

I was minding my business playing in forest in a call with my friend and a random kid started saying I said that he works at home depot because he is Mexican so I just muted him and keep playing and then i see a moderator reporting me because he said I said something rasist and didn’t even ask for my side of the story and then he got his moderator friends in the code and got them to report me.         The names of the kid that was lying is sss the moderator names were apple pie gojo and d4rk barry

As a staff of the game it has a very nice community and it has active staff its in the newest update which i love and theres a great anticheat so theres no one thats cheating it has fixed preds so if you try to use low hz it wont work and please download it to help our game and have a nice day!
As the owner of the game i woulf like to say this games community is the best. Staff is super friendly and always active

People so nice and you don’t have to worry about losing your shiny rocks you get a lot and moderators are the best ￼especiall ￼ Pablo  he my favorite he give me  a idea ￼  ￼  ￼I trying to become moderator pls Oreo give me it i think I will be good
this game is really good, you should play it

The game is just him
Hi im des4mond in the discord this is the best game i have ever played staff is active frequent updates free longarms working lobbies and so much more
I follow ALL the rules and really nice to everyone there ALOT of little kids saying slurs pls can I have the stick  if you let me then can I have instant ban pls best game EVER!!!
Great game definitely recommend

Really fun good staff and community
It’s just amazing because I love gorilla tag so I already know it’s going to be amazing also the comment on feathers check him he is a dud just because he was working on the game

reviews.review_title: My Friend Made Me A Game
reviews.review_description: Ok

The long arms in this game encouraged me to name my self rizzypanda46 and cook. This changed my life, I've never played a game like this, I was depressed, broke, and homeless. until a kind man gave me 300 dollars, and I bought a vr and played this game. I am now a billionaire, I live in a mansion in Beverly hills, and I have a wife and 79 kids.
